description.value: **Benefit:** The benefit granted by this feat depends on which tribe you belong to: Moon Clan: You gain a +1 bonus on Will saves and a +2 bonus on Perception checks. Axe Clan: If you have the rage ability, you can rage for 3 additional rounds per day. You also gain a +2 bonus on Intimidate checks. Hawk Clan: You gain a +2 bonus on Initiative checks and a +2 bonus on Ride checks. Spire Clan: You gain a +1 bonus on Fortitude saves and a +2 bonus on Perception checks. Sun Clan: You gain a +1 bonus on Reflex saves and a +2 bonus on Acrobatics checks. Skull Clan: You gain a +2 bonus on weapon damage against undead and a +2 bonus on Heal checks. Wind Clan: Your base land speed increases by 5 feet. You also gain a +2 bonus on Acrobatics checks.
